calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Veres for Sondra Hull.

Mr. Veres stated that Mary Ann Thompson Bowers was a Co-Conservator, that Ms. Bowers was not giving hours, that he had no communication with her and that Sondra was the only one cooperating. The Court stated that a prior order directed fees be split 50/50 and that without a waiver from Ms. Bowers, the Court had to abide by that order. The Court granted the petition, (the order was to be reviewed for signing).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Continued To May-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Continued To May-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (706 Mendell St., San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 286897. Counsel was not in court at 9:08am. Court passed the matter.
At 9:50am, Carol Veres Reed appearing for Sondra Hull, conservator for Stella Thompson and executor for the Ned Thompson Estate.
Court started with the petition for sale of conservatee's residence. Petition granted. Order signed.
One sale of 706 Mendell Street, SF, CA, each estate has an undivided 50% interest. The buyer is prepared to go forward with the sale. Sale is confirmed at $495,000.00 for 100% interest. Additional bond in the amount of $290,000.00 is required. Counsel stated that the additional bond has been filed. One order signed in each case.
On sale of 1574 Innes Avenue, SF, CA, each estate has an undivided 50% interest. Sale is confirmed at $565,000.00. Additional bond in the amount of $290,000.00 ie required. Counsel stated that the additional bond has been filed. One order signed in each case.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
